name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Los Angeles-based Swift Title Loans at 1902 Ave of the Stars, CA provides quick title loans and cash advances.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans maintains a dedicated storefront at 1902 Ave of the Stars in central Los Angeles, CA. This standalone location specializes in title-based lending and cash advances. While specific operating hours are not published online, you can call the location to confirm availability.

At this Los Angeles branch, customers can apply for title loans using their vehicle as collateral for fast cash. The team at 1902 Ave of the Stars handles applications efficiently with personalized service. Contact +1 213-674-2607 to discuss your options and schedule an appointment.

For Los Angeles residents seeking quick cash without lengthy approval processes, Swift Title Loans offers a straightforward solution. Bring your vehicle title, valid ID, and proof of residence to the Ave of the Stars location. The streamlined process helps qualifying borrowers get approved and funded quickly.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day funding available for applications submitted before noon with 7-minute online application process
No credit check required; approvals based on vehicle value rather than credit score or history
Borrowers keep their car during the loan period; title is held as collateral only
No store visit required; completely online application with photo-based vehicle documentation
Explicitly welcomes applicants with past bankruptcy, bad credit, and poor credit history
Loan amounts available up to $50,000 for qualified applicants
Advertises no-obligation free quotes and comparison shopping before commitment
cons: No interest rates, APR, or fee structures disclosed on the website, preventing transparent comparison
Title loans carry high default risk and potential vehicle repossession if payments are missed
Company's own disclaimer warns products are only for short-term relief and explicitly cautions against borrowing cycles
Customer reviews are dated (oldest from 2-3 years ago) and limited in number for assessing current service quality
Physical address listed (207 E Canal St, Mulberry, FL) appears to be corporate/administrative, not the Los Angeles service location
best_for: Consumers with immediate emergency cash needs ($100–$50,000) who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
Self-employed or gig workers without stable employment history or recent tax returns required by banks
Individuals with past bankruptcy or significantly damaged credit seeking one-time rapid funding
Vehicle owners who can afford loan repayment and wish to retain daily use of their car during the loan term
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best for consumers facing genuine financial emergencies who own vehicles and cannot access traditional personal loans due to poor credit or lack of income documentation. The critical caveat is that title loans, while fast and accessible, are high-cost short-term products with serious default consequences (vehicle loss); this lender should be viewed as a last-resort emergency option only, not a regular credit solution. Applicants must carefully review actual APR and fee terms (not published on this website) before committing.
services: Car title loans with same-day funding option
Keep-your-car financing (vehicle retained by borrower during loan term)
Phone, email, and online application channels
SSL/TLS encrypted online documentation and data security
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1902 Ave of the Stars #101, Los Angeles, CA 90067
meta_description: Los Angeles title loans at 1902 Ave of the Stars, CA. Swift Title Loans offers fast cash advances.
